live_migration_support_notes: Use replication/journal feed when configured; otherwise trigger/audit/proxy delta or final source write freeze is required.
primary_method: backup/snapshot plus replication journal or transaction delta
initial_snapshot_or_seed: Services gbak/nbackup or consistent extract with transaction inventory evidence
delta_feed_or_change_capture: Firebird replication/journal feed when configured; otherwise trigger/audit/proxy-observed deltas
proxy_method: Firebird wire/services proxy with attachment/transaction/readiness routing
alternate_or_fallback: services backup restore plus final source write freeze when no deterministic delta exists
required_cutover_barrier: final delta drained; generators and transaction inventory mapped; PSQL/BLR remap verified; service metadata compare clean
parser_worker_scope: parse reference migration commands/wire/API messages; classify route; render reference diagnostics; no execution/finality authority
sbup_role_a_scope: trusted Role A bridge/proxy/source connector after engine admission; normalizes source events to ReferenceLiveIngestEventRecord; invokes admitted SBLR/internal procedures only
engine_mga_rule: destination ScratchBird MGA owns target commit visibility rollback recovery cutover evidence; reference feed tokens are evidence only
proof_tests: project/tests reference regression original baseline emulation steady-state active live-migration proxy mirror crash-restart idempotent replay rollback cutover performance and support bundle proofs
